candidate_rows.claim_ceiling: N30-C4 mechanism-diverse medium perturbation / trace candidate only; no later eligibility dependency, minimal shared-medium participation, shared-medium coordination, or native shared-medium organization

control_results.blocked_condition: focal stability exists without regime-specific environment-side capacity evidence
control_results.expected_result: claim blocked if only focal survival is present

i5a_scope_classification.c4_c5_rule: C4 = changed medium surface exists; C5 = later response depends on that changed surface.
i5a_scope_classification.i6_lineage_rule: I6 must consume this exact relation_chain_id or declare a parent_relation_chain_id plus a justified fork.

i5a_vs_i5_comparison.claim_boundary: I5-A strengthens I5 as a second source-current medium-surface trace mechanism. It does not replace I5, widen M1 into M2, or support minimal shared-medium participation.
i5a_vs_i5_comparison.mechanism_distinction_from_i5: I5 consumes the N28 I4-A single-shell strengthening source. I5-A consumes the N28 I4-A2 split-shell / delayed-boundary mechanism source.
i5a_vs_i5_comparison.source_mechanism_note: I4-A strengthens I4 by margin in a beta local shell; I4-A2 tests a distinct split-shell/delayed-boundary mechanism.
i5a_vs_i5_comparison.strengthening_kind: mechanism_diversity_and_repeatability; I5-A shows that M1 surface-trace evidence is not confined to the I5 single-shell strengthening mechanism

remaining_debt: later eligibility dependency not tested until I6
runtime controls over actual N30 relation chain pending I7
decay curve not measured in I5-A

participant_admissibility_guardrail_sour.guardrail_scope: I4-B establishes participant-side readiness discipline; it is not imported as proof that the N27 carrier itself perturbed the N28 medium surface.

participant_attribution_trace.participant_medium_separation_argument: The participant side is the N28 focal basin; the medium surface is the distinct split-shell neighbor capacity surface. The row uses I4-B as a participant discipline guardrail while the load-bearing medium trace comes from N28 I4-A2 source-current artifacts.

candidate_rows.participant_medium_separation_argument: The participant side is the N28 focal basin; the medium surface is the distinct split-shell neighbor capacity surface. The row uses I4-B as a participant discipline guardrail while the load-bearing medium trace comes from N28 I4-A2 source-current artifacts.

perturbation_trace.participant_to_medium_causal_closure_sta: not_finalized_until_I6_I7; I5-A records mechanism-diverse source-current perturbation and surface change, not later eligibility dependence
